programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A man in Richland County, SC leads police on a vehicle pursuit that ends when he crashes into a highway exit sign; a female employee at a local restaurant in Tallahassee, FL allegedly stabs a customer in the back four times before being apprehended by police; neighbors in Citrus County, FL get into an argument about their dogs that ends with a chihuahua being cut with a knife.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Richland County South Carolina officers smell marijuana coming from a car, which leads to a car and foot chase. An officer in Wilmington North Carolina responds to a disturbance call by showing off her football throwing skills.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Berkeley County South Carolina officers go the extra mile in a high-speed chase. K9 patrol in Wilmington, North Carolina, use their dogs to sniff out a carload of potential contraband. Officers in Citrus County, Florida, track down a stolen vehicle used for suspicious activity.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A man in Richland County, SC leads police on a vehicle pursuit that ends when he crashes into a highway exit sign; a female employee at a local restaurant in Tallahassee, FL allegedly stabs a customer in the back four times before being apprehended by police; neighbors in Citrus County, FL get into an argument about their dogs that ends with a chihuahua being cut with a knife.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: A highly irate man at a burger joint in El Paso is tased by police. Richland County police find a bag full of possible drugs in a suspicious car. Pasco County police respond to a landlord-tenant dispute, only to find the landlord eating a large chunk of ham.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: Nuwave Forever, Air Purifier With Never Replace Filters
programme.desc: B. Johnson shares the Nuwave Forever Air Purifier with NeverReplace Filters; get the smart Wi-Fi-enabled air purifier that helps achieve zero airborne pollutants without any additional replacement filters.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael turns pantry staples into a flavorful feast, starting with roasted potatoes, broccoli, garlic and tomatoes.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes
programme.sub-title: White Bean Soup With Albanian Snacks and Baklava
programme.desc: Rachael and her sister Maria, joined by friends Leida and Vina, cook up a feast in Rachael's Tuscan kitchen.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Keith talks his partners into going in with him on a zombie house flip located in a prime school district that he not only just purchased but that he already flipped five years ago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: The team's latest project is plagued by plumbing issues, design disputes, budget-busting construction hurdles, and a terrible odor hidden somewhere inside the home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.sub-title: Back to the Flip: Worn Out Welcomes
programme.desc: The team's hospitality is put to the test when unwanted house guests threaten the flip before it even hits the market.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Million Dollar Zombie Flips
programme.desc: James Dainard has seen it all, but nothing quite like this. Longtime real estate deal-finders Buck and Will want to partner with James and step into the flipping world, but they're total rookies. Clueless about renovation but full of big ideas, they pitch James on a disaster of a house: a damaged roof, a choppy main floor, and a yard and deck that are more jungle than backyard.

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: After establishing a new business in Blue Ridge, Tom and his wife Mary Jane have decided to upgrade their weekender status! But finding a forever home where they can entertain with an art studio for Mary Jane, mountain view, complete seclusion and only minutes from town will be a tall order. Which property will inspire Mary Jane's next masterpiece?

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Chris and Lily are trading in ocean vistas for mountain views and while they agree on the scenery and the need to accommodate extended family, they struggle to see eye to eye on style; after touring everything from traditional to contemporary, whose design eye will prevail?

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Anthony is trying to move on from his troubled past, but his huge thigh lump is holding him back; Mary has a mysterious 70-year-old bump that amazes Drs. Lee and Tomassian; Sultana has a shocking red rash on her face.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Denise has a growth on her booty, but scarring from a previous trauma has kept her from getting it removed; Zachary's career is dragged down by his psoriasis; John would love to find a soulmate but will not date because of the huge bump on his cheek.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programme.desc: Rachael's arm bump interferes with helping her disabled bestie; medical student Gili assists Dr. Lee with Christian's painful back bump; Soniya hates the superstitions and judgments people have about the dark spots covering her face and torso.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Buying erupts in Hawaiian Gardens, CA. Barry decides to start thinking inside the box, and brings and inside man. Jarrod fills the store, but empties his wallet. Dave helps the Dotson's commissions. And with the Sheets split, Brandon discovers just why people call his dad The Gambler.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino is full of surprises, particularly for Rene and Casey, who roll the dice on some sealed totes; Kenny stumbles over some odd-looking car parts; Lisa shields herself from disaster with an unusually expensive locker.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod hopes that scoring more lockers will prevent Brandi from closing the store in Long Beach; Ivy attempts to intimidate the other bidders; Rene's cockiness could prove to be a detriment.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers seek to school Rene on his home turf; Darrell hopes to blast the competition; Jarrod and Brandi try to break out of their slump.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Dave drives up the bidding in La Verne, Calif.; Darrell works alone; Jarrod and Brandi try a new system.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell has to deal with Kimber's eyes on a competitor; Ivy brings a full truck, hoping for a second haul; Dusty unpacks what could be the ultimate assistant; Rene's hunch serves him well, putting together one of his greatest profits.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Everything is coming up "Brandi" in Banning, as she milks all she can out of her buy; Ivy knows good tools when he sees them; Lisa forms some sweet success out of an otherwise bland unit, while Kenny scores on a high-brow horseplay hoard.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: Back to the Locker: Locker Queens
programme.desc: Modern-day pirates blindly bid on abandoned storage units that may contain junk or treasure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The Revival
programme.desc: Willie and Korie head back to their old college stomping grounds to visit their son, Rowdy, sparking an idea to get John Luke to finish school; the Robertsons rally to pick mayhaws and make homemade jam. And in true Jase fashion, he decides the sons-in-law should learn jiu-jitsu as part of their training to be Buck Boys.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny gets ganged up on in Riverside by the field of buyers; Dave buys an old unit and takes a voyage back in time; Ivy scores a locker that inspires him to go clubbing; Emily puts her foot down with a statement buy on a massive locker.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.sub-title: Back to the Locker: Locker Queens
programme.desc: Modern-day pirates blindly bid on abandoned storage units that may contain junk or treasure.

programme.desc: It's a spooky All Hallow's Eve in Huntington Beach, as Kenny books an appearance with his dark side; Brandi finds evidence of a possible payday; Ivy does what he can with whatever he has; Mary's locker requires some rescuing.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programme.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Troopers engage in a manhunt to track down a fugitive on the streets of Fairbanks in frigid sub-zero temperatures.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: On the lookout for illegal hunters of sheep, caribou and moose; a trooper tips over his four-wheeler and breaks his ankle; tourists flock to Alaska's largest island, Kodiak.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: A possibly fatal motorcycle accident involving alcohol; a domestic violence call; enforcing strict wildlife regulations in remote and rugged Alaskan terrains.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: The troopers face out-of-control partiers on the Kenai Penninsula and a search-and-rescue mission on melting ice. A trooper must board a plane to carry out a felony probation check in White Mountain.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: With many Alaskans being gun owners, tensions can quickly elevate; troopers respond to calls of shots fired; patrolling the Iditarod sled dog race.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Troopers patrol the busy Seward Highway, packed with locals and tourists. From traffic stops to fleeing suspects and checking bear bait stations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: A woman in distress stuck on a rocky cliff; dealing with erratic drivers and disturbance calls; keeping the streets and forests of Alaska safe.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: The story of one of the greatest technical athletes in the history of the sport, five-time WWE titleholder Bret Hart, with a look at his celebrated career.

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.desc: Sgt. Slaughter is arguably one of the most iconic characters in professional wrestling history; whether he portrayed the villain drill instructor, the American Hero, or an Iraqi Sympathizer, Sgt. Slaughter was always at the top of the card.

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Von Erichs, Part 1
programme.desc: The Von Erichs, professional wrestling royalty, crowned with extraordinary success and haunted by tragedy; under the iron will of patriarch Fritz Von Erich, brothers Kevin, David, and Kerry became the most electrifying trio in America, drawing record crowds and inspiring a generation of fans; but as their fame soared, tragedy struck: first with David's sudden death at 25, then more heartbreak to follow, turning one of wrestling's greatest success stories into one of its most haunting legacies.

programme.title: Biography: WWE Legends
programme.sub-title: The Curse of the Von Erichs, Part 2
programme.desc: The story of the Von Erichs enters its most devastating chapter; at the height of their success, brother Mike is struck by rare toxic shock syndrome; as the family struggles to recover, Kerry survives a horrific motorcycle crash that costs him his foot; the series of tragedies that follows is unthinkable; so haunting is their story that it inspired a 2023 feature film.

programme.title: WWE LFG
programme.desc: Things get heated in the first tag match of the season, while Kevin Owens and Natalya help two female Future Greats find their inner aggression; and in the main event, Coach Bubba helps Drake Morreaux put it all on the line against newcomer Nathan Cranton.

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: The incomparable "Rowdy" Roddy Piper stood above all when it came to antagonizing audiences worldwide; the Hot Rod is an all-time WWE Legend, and his antics will be remembered for generations to come; relive his unforgettable boxing match with Mr. T at WrestleMania 2, his instant classic with Bret "Hitman" Hart, and the talk show that started it all Piper's Pit!

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: There's nothing like a first impression! And in the world of WWE, the first appearance of a Superstar means everything, especially in the unpredictable era of the 1990s; witness the greatest debuts of superstars like Mankind, Kurt Angle, Undertaker, The Rock and so many more!
